item.title: Kickin it old school with some bottom shelf memes.
item.description:
I'm like hey, what's up, hello.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Make fun of me @CrimeBrulee
Bottom shelf algorithm break. What does the internet want me to buy today?
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Nastiest fuckin thing I have EVER put inside my mouth.
discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Join for the games! We've been playing Palworld, Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
@FrothyStout
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Superman stories
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: The future is here and it is glorious!
item.description: We have Netflix and Disney+ and I just cant afford any more. I tried to find Walking Dead the other day, and I found it on a service I dont have. Got a free 1 week trial. I actually remembered to unsubscribe before the week was up. Yay me, I guess. Edit: A friend of mine suggested I try MyFlixr. Im actually impressed. No viruses so far, and all my favorite 90s movies are there (not an ad, just me wanting to share). I havent used it for a while, though, so idk if its still good.
item.dc:creator: MrsPrendsen

item.title: The crow realizes that the mouse is afraid of him and leaves a piece of food to the mouse.
item.dc:creator: smartguy1337

item.title: My perpetraitor just died
item.description: My father abused me during my teenyears, 12 to 19 years old and it ended when I told my mother. We reported him to the police. My father actually got sent to prison for 4,5 years (got out after 3 even though he didn't behave). I haven't talked to him since that day when I pretented to go to school but instead met up with my mother and went to the police. I have been waiting for him to die though. I still have complex PTSD symtoms from the abuse and my life with him. It has been 19 years since the police report and I STILL DREAM that I am back in his violence like I never even left. Feels so real sometimes But I never imagned what it would feel like when he actually died. A relative that I have never spoken to, contacted me yesterday to tell me that he passed away, alone in his apartment for days before anyone even noticed. This person also told me that he had been trying to abuse someone else in the family and I know that he also got convicted for sexual harassment on a 18 year old a few years ago. So now I am free from him for real, he does no longer excist in this world. Most of all I am glad that he can no longer hurt anyone else. We are so many that are echoes of his evilness. He was a monster and now he is dead. May he not rest in peace.
item.dc:creator: portraitofmine

item.title: This Dog named Lucky was shot many times while fighting robbers who broke into his house. Lucky won the fight for his life, which lasted 54 days, having three surgeries. Lucky was sent home from the hospital as a hero.
item.dc:creator: redditsauce

item.title: No brain cells in this video
item.dc:creator: strangegaijin

item.title: Hot Saturday night cleaning my room(I’m taking a break rn)
item.description:
The next time I actually want to date someone, I’m using this.
It’s not a waifu house, it’s a waifu home.
Started a dream journal recently & not into how often this awful rollercoaster/light rail combo between cities shows up.
Spring feels like it’s for strange noodles
Oh god no one make me immortal
He ain’t liking how often I’m singing jingles about my turn radius
Feeling very called out by whoever photoshopped these 4 photos of me together.
Heading to the faewild. Y’all need anything?
When did we stop naming folks Knife? We used to be a proper country.
Nana didn’t want sweets, so she got birthday guacamole.
Just three bonkers cute hats I crocheted for my friend’s kids.
item.dc:creator: kgblueberry

item.title: Ron, Ron.
item.description: Hey IMGUR..... why are you tagging my posts? I left it untagged and you're barging in. Seriously F off. Don't you hate when all usernames are already taken?

item.title: Home of the Future
item.description: No affordable homes available in the area. A choice piece of property unexpectedly became available and I pounced. Plan is to pay off the land and use the deed as collateral for a future build or purchase. *Edit- Thanks for all the suggestions, advice and looking out. A few repeated q’s answered: Buildable lot, Utilities/septic available, last lot in developed neighborhood, HOA is much more a neighborly org than a controlling body, no tiny homes, campsites or trailers, no McMansions, ocean view but not ocean front(no erosion concerns, not in a real flood zone. It seems many of us are in a similar boat, hope we all fare well.
item.dc:creator: moneybroom
